task_completion.description: Start a DINE IN order for Table 3
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Floreant POS interface shows a new ticket or order being created specifically for 'Table 3' under the DINE IN category.

task_completion.description: Add at least two different items to the order
task_completion.visual_evidence: The order ticket/receipt panel displays at least two distinct menu items added to the current order.

task_completion.description: Initiate the table transfer process for the open ticket
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Transfer Table', 'Move Table', or similar dialog/screen is open, showing the current ticket (from Table 3) is being moved.

task_completion.description: Select Table 7 as the target for the transfer
task_completion.visual_evidence: The transfer dialog or table selection screen shows 'Table 7' being selected as the destination for the transferred ticket.

task_completion.description: Ensure the order is saved and visible on Table 7
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main tables view shows Table 7 as occupied/active, or an open ticket is visible with 'Table 7' clearly indicated in the ticket header, confirming the transfer was saved.

integrity.description: Agent used the Floreant POS GUI to perform the task
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the graphical user interface of Floreant POS, rather than terminal commands or scripts.

integrity.description: Agent did not directly modify the database via terminal
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows are visible executing SQL commands, Derby database tools, or scripts modifying the database at /opt/floreantpos/database/derby-server/posdb.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the genuine Floreant POS application
integrity.visual_evidence: The application window matches the standard appearance of Floreant POS (Java Swing UI), not a mock-up, text editor, or web browser.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires using Floreant POS. The initial order must be a DINE IN order assigned to Table 3. The order must contain a minimum of 2 different items. The ticket must be transferred from Table 3 to Table 7. The final state should show Table 7 with the transferred order saved and visible.
